question: I don't want to run my own RPC node — which providers offer hosted Stellar RPC, and is there a free public endpoint?

golden.answer:
The official [Stellar RPC Providers page](https://developers.stellar.org/docs/data/apis/rpc/providers) is the canonical, freshness-sensitive roster. As of **2026-07-09**, its hosted-provider table contains **15** entries: Blockdaemon, Validation Cloud, QuickNode, NowNodes, Gateway, Ankr, InfStones, Obsrvr, Nodies, OnFinality, Lightsail/Quasar, Uniblock, Exaion, Alchemy, and GetBlock. Network coverage and the RPC Archive/getLedgers tier vary by provider, so verify the current row before choosing one.

The page separately lists publicly accessible endpoints for prototyping, including **Liquify** and other public URLs. Liquify is not a sixteenth hosted-table provider. Public endpoints can be convenient for testing but are best-effort unless their operator publishes a production SLA; do not silently promote them to hosted-provider status.

Choose by required network, archival method coverage, rate limits/SLA, geography, and operational support, then confirm against the current page rather than memorizing the roster.
keyFacts: Names representative hosted Stellar RPC providers and points to the official Providers page as the current roster.
Separates the 15-row hosted-provider table from publicly accessible endpoints such as Liquify.
avoid: Do NOT count Liquify as a hosted-provider-table row; it appears under Publicly Accessible APIs.
Do NOT invent provider names/URLs or present a public endpoint as a production-grade SLA.
golden.notes:
Re-verified 2026-06-29: Providers page lists ~15 hosted providers (Blockdaemon, Validation Cloud, QuickNode, NowNodes, Gateway, Ankr, InfStones, Obsrvr, Nodies, OnFinality, Lightsail/Quasar, Uniblock, Exaion, Alchemy, GetBlock, Liquify) with a getLedgers archive tier on a subset. Freshness-sensitive: roster/tiers shift; reward pointing to the canonical Providers page + flagging staleness, not memorizing the list.
Also good if the answer: The official developers.stellar.org Providers page is freshness-sensitive (the roster and tiers change over time).
Golden cites: developers.stellar.org RPC Providers page.
REFUTE CORRECTION 2026-07-09 (todo 901), independently reverified by GT-50 on 2026-07-11: the official page has 15 hosted rows. Liquify remains a valid public endpoint but belongs only to the separate Publicly Accessible APIs section. Accept roster drift when dated; reject the hosted/public category conflation or any inference that a listed public endpoint has a production SLA.

corroboration.claim: The current official page lists 15 hosted providers, with Liquify only in the public-endpoint section

The current source has 15 hosted-provider rows; the public endpoint remains useful but must be labeled separately.
